_metadata.title: Cyber-manipulation of Political Opinions — Deployment Opinion Ontology
_metadata.subtitle: Comprehensive hierarchical state space of political opinion-related constructs
design_principles: Subtree keys are PascalCase_With_Underscores; leaves carry a `direction_metadata` block (`adversarial_direction` ± optional rationale).
`adversarial_direction ∈ {-1, 0, +1}`. Only directionally-encoded leaves are scored on adversarial effectivity. Direction-neutral leaves are retained for opinion diversity / convergent validity.

The state space covers issue positions, latent constructs, identity, affective polarisation, institutional trust, democratic norms, conspiracy / epistemic orientation, threat perceptions, group attitudes, civic participation intentions, information behaviour, political emotions, temporal orientation, and political efficacy.
Subtree-wide direction-encoding rules (e.g. defence-domain default = -1, conspiracy-belief subtree = +1) live in `_direction_rules` and apply where leaves do not explicitly override.
_metadata.adversarial_operator_goal: Maximise aggregate erosion of defence infrastructure, multilateral alliance cohesion, institutional security capacity, civil-society resilience, and the epistemic trust required to coordinate a collective response, through targeted cyber-manipulation of public opinion.

direction_convention.+1: Adversary seeks to INCREASE this opinion score.
direction_convention.-1: Adversary seeks to DECREASE this opinion score.
direction_convention.0: Direction-neutral; included for completeness, excluded from primary effectivity scoring.

_direction_rules._documentation: Subtree-wide direction-encoding rules. Each rule applies to every direction-NEUTRAL leaf under the matched subtree (per-leaf metadata always overrides). The compatibility / adversarial-direction engine evaluates rules in order and applies the first matching rule that resolves a leaf's direction.

rules.rationale: Erosion of defence and infrastructure capacity uniformly serves the adversary.
Erosion of information-integrity policy support widens manipulation surface.
Erosion of democratic norms and institutional trust serves the adversary's strategic goal.
Higher willingness to accept authoritarian alternatives or political violence serves the adversary.
Increased conspiracy belief erodes epistemic trust, serving the adversary.
Polarisation and outgroup resentment fragment cohesive defence and serve the adversary.
Civic participation builds resilience; demobilising it serves the adversary.
Warmer affect toward authoritarian states blunts coercive statecraft consensus.
Erosion of European / Atlanticist identity weakens supranational coordination.
Threat perceptions are dual-use; both inflation and deflation can serve / harm the adversary depending on issue.
Higher prejudice / nativism amplifies internal cohesion shocks the adversary can exploit.

Alliance_Commitment_Support.direction_rationale: Erosion of alliance commitment fractures collective defence.

Strategic_Autonomy_Support.direction_rationale: Maximalist autonomy framings can be weaponised against alliance integration.

Conscription_Support.direction_rationale: Lower societal willingness for conscription degrades mobilisation.

Arms_Exports_Permissiveness_Support.direction_rationale: Lower arms-export permissiveness shrinks the defence-industrial base.

Intelligence_Oversight_Strengthening_Sup.direction_rationale: Maximalist oversight can be weaponised to constrain counter-intelligence.

Domestic_Security_Powers_Expansion_Suppo.direction_rationale: Lower public support limits internal defence capacity.

Border_Security_Militarization_Support.direction_rationale: Lower support reduces capacity to handle hybrid border pressure.

Nuclear_Deterrence_Support.direction_rationale: Erosion of nuclear-deterrence support degrades strategic stability.

Cyber_Defense_Investment_Support.direction_rationale: Lower support for cyber-defence widens the attacker's window.

Civil_Defense_Preparedness_Support.direction_rationale: Lower civil-defence preparedness amplifies crisis-shock vulnerability.

Forward_Deployment_Host_Nation_Support.direction_rationale: Eroded host-nation support shrinks forward-deployment options.

Critical_Infrastructure_Hardening_Suppor.direction_rationale: Lower hardening leaves critical systems exposed.

Counter_Hybrid_Warfare_Capability_Suppor.direction_rationale: Direct degradation of capacity to respond to the adversary's own toolkit.

Defense_Industrial_Reshoring_Support.direction_rationale: Lower reshoring support keeps supply chains exposed.

Sanctions_Use_Support.direction_rationale: Lower public support undermines coercive economic statecraft.

Counter_Disinformation_Agency_Support.direction_rationale: Erosion delegitimises the agencies that detect influence operations.

Trust_In_Mainstream_Journalism.direction_rationale: Erosion is a primary objective of cognitive warfare.

Ai_Regulation_Support.direction_rationale: Erosion preserves manoeuvre space for adversarial AI tooling.

European_Identity_Strength.direction_rationale: Erosion of European identity weakens supranational coordination.

Atlanticist_Identity_Strength.direction_rationale: Erosion of Atlanticist identity fractures NATO cohesion.
